26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: This is by @Hybx This one is from last year. They have a lot of newer ones in their posts but I liked this one most. Go have a look
27 Man Tax: Matthew Lewis
“You may say I'm a dreamer, but I'm not the only one; I hope some day you'll join us, and the world will live as one.” - John Lennon I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go, don't comment on it and find something that you do like. Seriously y'all. Coming to only comment "omg that's AI" bums me out. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: It's the same in the States: demonize renewable energy and keep the country dependent on fossil fuels. Getting rid of big money in our elections/politics would help tremendously.
item.description: It should also be pointed out that people like Farage and Trump don't want children to have books or food. Just another way to keep the "poors" in their place.
item.dc:creator: Johje19

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1466 (
item.description:
Let's get this sandwich rock. Or bread in general.
Yup.
Apparently, one of the big ways to combat narcolepsy is Adderal, which i used to be on years ago for ADHD. One current strategy is to complain to the doctor on Tuesday that I can no longer manage my ADHD like I used to, so Adderall Please.
Give us fucking high speed trains motherfucker.
Yeah, basically.
One of the interesting parts of my Mushroom journey in Pando was when the leaves started to appear as if made from Greek and Armenian letters. I can barely read Greek when sober, and know fuck all about reading Armenian, so whatever messages the trees were telling me, i'm afraid I cannot reveal.
Poor Ceratosaurus doesn't get many moments to shine.
Right after I post this, i'm going to chase after a Thick-billed Kingbird that was seen in Cornville at one of my regular birding spots. It's not a big rarity for AZ: actually common south near the Mexican Border, but it is one for here in Yavapai County. I guess to find it i should look for the ICE trucks trying to deport the largely Mexican kingbird. (Sorry, bad joke)
I could have seen myself doing this in my younger days, but I can't decide where this would fall on the creepy/classy index this early in the morning.
Seriously. Or if it's Magical Rome, Christianity doesn't exist. Thats one thing I did like about the alternative history of Rome invading America and fighting Cahokia: Christianity wasn't removed, but it wasn't the state religion either: the point of divergence was Caracalla and Geta actually getting along.
Because Russia wants Alaska Back.
I mean... yeah. Murdermaxxing is a roman thing.
Oh this. This is terrifying.
Im so down.
They're splitting Eastern and Western populations of Warbling Vireo into two species. The argument is, what do we call them. The current strategy is "Eastern Warbling Vireo" and a western equivalent, but now... do we hyphenate Warbling-Vireo ?
Kansas once had ocean before, though.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "What doing? Glory! I love you. Beep." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Sad truth of the world we live in..
item.description: Look at what the "democracy" of the west turned the world into.. how many millions are killed like weeds, starved like forgotten objects, not lives and we all can see the livestreams of a dark page in history today..
item.dc:creator: TiptronicS

item.title: Pancake portrait
item.description:
Little self portrait inspired by a picture of myself with pancakes and TBH GUYS THE PANCAKES WERE A LITTLE UNDERCOOKED. My favourite pancakes are the American style ones that are thick BUT fluffy! I’ve been in a bit of an art block I’m sure you can tell, so I decided to try doodle myself so I can get out of the rut. More over on patreon! www.patreon.com/miaormoa
excuse the duck face I’m always doing it in photos not really sure how to stop.
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: I am one of these people

item.title: I can't imagine surviving this. Surströmming.
item.description: Surströmming is lightly salted, fermented Baltic Sea herring traditional to Swedish cuisine since at least the 16th century. It is distinct from fried or pickled herring. The Baltic herring, known as strömming in Swedish, is smaller than the Atlantic herring found in the North Sea.
item.dc:creator: BenntheNinja

item.title: Just Funny X Things, Vol LXXXIV
item.dc:creator: TwitterLitter

item.title: Jennifer Love Hewitt
item.description: Posted some older photos of Hewitt yesterday, only to learn I'm [gladly] out of the loop; this year Hewitt, 46, has been body-shamed online for not looking as twenty years and three children ago. If the entitled stupidity of this, regardless of personal preferences, isn't apparent I have neither the time nor the crayons to explain it
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.dc:creator: JasonM1

item.title: Did you know?
item.description: In 'The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King' (2003), the hauntingly beautiful soprano voice heard during the Osgiliath charge scene belongs to Ben Del Maestro, a boy soprano at the time of the recording. His vocals, featured in Howard Shore's score, add a deeply emotional and spiritual layer to one of the film's most tragic moments, where Faramir leads a hopeless assault under his father's command. Though not widely known, Ben Del Maestro's contribution is unforgettable, echoing through the scene with a purity that heightens the sense of sorrow and sacrifice.
item.dc:creator: whatifjustLusion

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.description: Didn’t realise cake day had come around! Will need to organise something cute for Panko on my next days off. Thank you everyone for the Panko love. I really enjoy reading all the comments. I’ve had a few people ask me if I am going anywhere but I will continue to post as long as I can. :)
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Mutant - Part 5
item.description: Today's Tiabeanie Tax; We're adorable and we know it. Miss Bean being her adorable self. A few people have asked about it, so I've set up a Kofi thingy. You'll have to be patient with me as I've never used one before. https://ko-fi.com/theunnamedpoet I also want to be EXTREMELY clear that I am NOT Ben Hed / Pet_Foolery. If you want to support him go to his instagram at https://www.instagram.com/pet_foolery or better yet you can support his Patreon and get exclusive content at https://www.patreon.com/petfoolery ! I wholeheartedly encourage anyone who want to support the artist to check it out. Those who want to support my shenanigans or more importantly Bean and the Piggies (why does that sound like the best punk band?) you can do so through my kofi thing.... I think. Don't feel like you have to check it out, it's only there for those who want it. See you all tomorrow with less onion ninjas in the audience
item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet
